candidate.completion: date me before i start naming the houseplants after exes.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please date me before i start naming the houseplants after exes.

evaluation.rationale: A clear comic image and a reasonably exact pivot, but the line escalates the plea more than it cleanly overturns it. The houseplant-after-exes image is fresh enough and carries recognizable loneliness, though the sentence is somewhat long and not especially elegant.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
